title: Full Autopilot Loop Proof v1
summary: Adds Phase167 proof, verifier, status, documentation, and manifest files for the full command JSON to closeout autopilot path.

changes.purpose: Operator-facing phase documentation and success criteria.
Verifier for repo files, request artifacts, and hard-stop safety markers.
QA Guarantee script that emits evidence, PASS_GUARANTEED handoff, and MERGE_PENDING approval file.
Read-only operator status script for the Phase167 full-loop proof.

hardStops: No merge approval is created until verifier passes.
PASS_GUARANTEED is the only merge-eligible status.
CLOSED_CLEANLY is required before the next phase begins.
This overlay does not add credentials, paid services, dependency installs, security-setting changes, or startup persistence.
